title: Wynncraft Icons Squared
description: Squared class select and content book icons for Wynncraft.
body:
Exactly as it says on the tin - it changes some tilted Wynncraft textures to be straight.

**Resource pack devs:** you probably want to recolour the non-unlocked colours for the content book. You can view the pre build image binaries at the git repo at the path `assets/minecraft/textures/wynn/gui/content_book/*_locked.png` (click [Here](https://endernon.crepe.moe/endernon/wynn-icons-squared/src/branch/main/assets/minecraft/textures/wynn/gui/content_book))
